title: Last Christmas
why_this_song: Last Christmas by Wham! (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: This year, to save me from tears
I'll give it to someone special
Last Christmas, I gave you my heart
But the very next day, you gave it away (you gave it away)
This year, to save me from tears
I'll give it to someone special (special)
Last Christmas, I gave you my heart
But the very next day, you gave it away

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gave" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gave" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "special" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "special" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Now I know what a fool I've been
A man undercover, but you tore me apart

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Last Christmas", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Last Christmas", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Last Christmas" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Last Christmas" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Last Christmas" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Last Christmas", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
